metadata.job_summary: Junior BA role at Swiss IT/Finance consulting firm supporting front office trading. Involves gathering requirements from FO/MO/Risk, writing functional specs, running UAT, coordinating IT-business teams, and ensuring FO/BO process coherence. Requires derivatives, fixed income, equity knowledge and trading systems experience.

research.company_mission: Swiss consulting firm dedicated to human capital management in IT and Finance, supporting growth through personality-focused methods and collective synergies.
research.recent_news: Active expansion in Geneva IT/Finance talent market with focus on banking, trading, and engineering roles.

resume.professional_summary: Trading product-focused MSc Finance candidate with derivatives, fixed income, and equity knowledge from coursework and active options portfolio management. Strong coordination skills developed managing concurrent workstreams and cross-functional stakeholders. Process optimization mindset demonstrated through automated dashboards and data pipeline development.
auraia_bullets: Staffed on 7 live mandates across healthcare, tech, and financial services with deal values from EUR 5M to EUR 50M, managing concurrent workstreams including valuations, due diligence, and process coordination with external advisors.

Built detailed financial models (DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions) and prepared client presentations for Board meetings, translating complex financial data into actionable insights for senior stakeholders.

Coordinated with legal, tax, and accounting advisors to structure transactions and negotiate deal terms, ensuring alignment between business requirements and technical execution across multiple parties.
resume.rc_bullet: Conducted financial and operational due diligence on targets with revenues of EUR 10M-30M, analyzing market trends, competitive positioning, and financial projections to identify key value drivers and support acquisition decisions for the CEO of Healthcare and Retail divisions.
resume.europ_bullet: Built automated financial dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs and performed variance analysis on monthly P&L results for a CHF 50M+ subsidiary, supporting the CFO in identifying operational efficiency improvements and reporting anomalies.
leadership_bullets: Founded Screeny.ai, an AI-driven software for investment banks to identify acquirers, reducing buyer search time from 10h+ to 20min and securing adoption by 3 advisory firms.
Finalist in McKinsey-sponsored case competition, developing a predictive model for black swan events using order book data with potential CHF 200K annual revenue impact.
Manage personal investment portfolio using options strategies (Cash Secured Puts, Covered Calls) on derivatives with 45-day expiries, achieving 8% annualized returns.
resume.courses: Derivatives, Fixed Income and Credit Risk, Quantitative Risk Management
resume.skills: Financial Modeling | Derivatives | Process Optimization | SQL & PowerBI

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Support front office trading Junior Position
cover_letter.intro: I'm looking for a role that bridges finance knowledge with technical coordination - translating what traders need into specifications that IT can implement. This position fits that exactly, and WIT Partners' focus on quality and transparency in consulting matches how I like to work.
cover_letter.body:
I have the product knowledge: my Master's covers derivatives, fixed income, and risk management, and I actively trade options myself, so I understand PnL tracking and position management from the user side. I also have the coordination experience: in M&A, I gathered requirements from clients and advisors, translated them into actionable workstreams, and coordinated execution across legal, tax, and technical teams. That's essentially what a BA does between Front Office and IT.
On the technical side, I built automated dashboards at Europ Assistance and developed data pipelines for Screeny.ai. I'm comfortable validating system changes and identifying anomalies - the kind of analytical rigor needed for UAT and production support.
cover_letter.closing: I'd welcome the chance to discuss how my background fits your front office support needs.

email.subject: Application - Support front office trading Junior - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Support front office trading Junior position at WIT Partners.

Your commitment to integrity and transparency in IT/Finance consulting aligns with my experience coordinating complex financial transactions. My background in derivatives, fixed income, and cross-functional stakeholder management positions me well to support front office trading operations.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Adrian Turion
